plugin_desc: Bintec 中小企业路由器/VPN 网关专用 SNMP 采集模板（BINTEC-MIB，企业号 272）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 Bintec 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：CPU 使用率（直接以百分比上报）与主内存（总量 + 空闲，字节，用量按 (总量-空闲)/总量 推导）。Bintec 紧凑型企业路由器多为无风扇固定配置设计，其私有 MIB 未以无需行级过滤的标量形式暴露独立温度/风扇/电源传感器，故温度、风扇与电源为 N/A。适用品牌型号——Bintec 路由器/VPN 网关（bintec-elmeg RS/RXL/be.IP 系列，企业号 272；与 Teldat 同源 MIB）。
name: Router

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Bintec router (BINTEC-MIB, reported directly as a percentage).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: Total memory of the Bintec router in bytes (BINTEC-MIB total memory).

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free memory of the Bintec router in bytes (BINTEC-MIB free memory).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Bintec router, derived as (total-free)/total.
